build.buildCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput --upload-unhashed-files

deploy.startCommand: python manage.py migrate --noinput && python manage.py ensure_superuser && python manage.py shell -c 'from django.core.cache import cache; cache.clear()' && (while true; do python manage.py sync_matches; sleep 1800; done &) && gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT
